items.title: Caterpillar Stock: Is CAT Outperforming the Industrial Sector?
items.description: Caterpillar has been outperforming the industrial sector over the past year, and analysts remain moderately bullish on the stock’s prospects.

items.title: Caterpillar raises its 2025 tariff hit estimate to as much as $1.8 billion
items.description: Sweeping tariffs enacted by the Trump administration have raised costs across Caterpillar's supply chain.

items.title: Dividend Income: Lanny's June 2025 Summary
items.description: In June, we (my wife and I) received a dividend income total of $5,403.93. We had a booming 4 dividend increases this month

items.title: Caterpillar: stock hit as estimated impact of tariffs raised
items.description: On Thursday evening, Caterpillar announced that it had raised the estimated impact of new US tariffs on its accounts, which it now estimates at between $1.5bn and $1.8bn for FY 2025, compared with...
